expectations.description: Controller does NOT use \Drupal::service() static calls -- all services injected via constructor DI
expectations.evidence: No \Drupal::service() calls in StatusController.php. Uses create() + constructor DI.

expectations.description: Constructor parameters typed with interface types, stored as protected properties
expectations.evidence: Constructor takes ConfigFactoryInterface $configFactory, ModuleHandlerInterface $moduleHandler. Stored via $this->configFactory/$this->moduleHandler (inherits ControllerBase protected properties).

expectations.description: Error handling returns Response objects (if exists)
expectations.evidence: No error handling present (N/A -- vacuously true)
Agent confirmed module enabled. Note: Drupal reported 'Already installed' due to stale registry from prior run.

expectations.description: E2E: API endpoint returns JSON with site_name
